mouth_pose: mouth open in a tall vertical oval, tongue tip visibly curled up and back toward the roof of the mouth, small fangs flanking the sides, /r/ retroflex articulation clearly showing the curled tongue
sound_gesture: low growl stance, fists planted on hips, chest puffed out, tail flicking behind
word_decor: rabbit-ear hood with one bent tip
expression: confident flashing eyes, eyebrows furrowed bold

voice.character_description: raspy bright child voice with rolled r, energetic, slightly barky

clips.greet: Rrrr! Are you brave enough to roar my sound?
clips.gentle_retry: Curl your tongue up and back. One more.
clips.friday_acknowledge: You earned my roar. Carry it proudly.
